description: This email template is an essential tactic for Human Resources and hiring managers to welcome new employees on their first day. It's designed to foster employee engagement and smooth onboarding process. The template provides a warm, professional welcome message that can be personalized for each new team member. It also includes space for scheduling the first meeting and sharing important information about the company culture and expectations. This template is a valuable resource to ensure that every new hire feels welcomed, informed, and ready to contribute to the team from day one. It's not just about saying 'welcome', it's about making them feel part of the team.
short_description: Boost employee engagement with our personalized email template, perfect for human resources and hiring managers. Facilitate a smooth onboarding experience and make every new hire feel welcome from their first meeting. Foster a sense of belonging and positive company culture from the start. An indispensable tool for effective HR management.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
